appraisal_events.evidence: « le sens critique … lui faisait complètement défaut, … il prenait tout au pied de la lettre »; son malentendu poli dans la loge de Sarah Bernhardt et ses demandes sur des expressions (« brûle les planches ») restent sans écho.
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator presents Cottard as lacking discernment and socially awkward; the anecdote with Mme Verdurin illustrates his literal-mindedness and ill-suited tact, which lowers him locally.

status_effects.explanation: His lack of critical sense and awkward behavior make him seem inferior and irritating, even in the eyes of Mme Verdurin.
